candidates.intentSummary: After any OpenClaw config patch or hand-edit, verify all agent peer bindings are still intact and surface any that are missing.
triggerPhrases: warum wird die binding config immer überschrieben WTF
proposedSteps: Read bindings[] from the live OpenClaw config via gateway config.get.
List all active bindings with agentId, peer.kind, and peer.id.
Compare against expected bindings from MEMORY.md / infra notes.
If any expected binding is absent: surface the specific missing entry and recovery config.patch command.
candidates.rejectedReason: Human review 2026-04-20: triggers are historical rant phrases (WTF outbursts, typo Tefy), not natural invocation language. Drafted SKILL.md references unverified gateway commands. Dropped 2026-04-21.

observations.intentSummary: Review and decide on incoming external PRs to the OpenCami repository, including applying minor fixes before merging or rejecting oversized PRs.
observations.reason: Only 2 distinct days; no new activity in extended window; coverage overlap with pr-pipeline and github-issue-fixer. Pattern fading — likely drops next scan if no recurrence.

observations.intentSummary: Periodically verify the Tefy agent config, binding, model, sandbox settings, and last-session time to confirm the agent is running correctly.
triggerPhrases: Tefy agent und telegram Channel alles gut? Checke Funktion keine Inhalte
observations.reason: Only 2 occurrences across 2 days — below minOccurrences floor of 3. Watch: if it recurs on a third day, may qualify.

notes: Ledger for skillminer. Every nightly scan mutates `candidates[]`, replaces `observations[]`, sets `last_scan`. `rejected[]` and `deferred[]` block re-proposal for 30 days via semantic (not just slug) match — entries REQUIRE `intentSummary` and `triggerPhrases`. `silenced[]` blocks re-proposal permanently (no expiry). `observations[]` is scan-scoped — fully replaced each scan with the current scan's sub-threshold patterns; a human can run `manage-ledger.sh promote <id>` to pull one into `candidates[]` as pending. Preferred mutation path: `scripts/manage-ledger.sh accept|reject|defer|promote|silence|unsilence <id> [reason]`.

candidate.intentSummary: one-sentence description (used for semantic cooldown matching)
candidate.occurrences: integer — COUNT IN THE MOST RECENT SCAN WINDOW
